title: Blurry
description: Dating web app based on the idea of 'blurring' physical appearance to foster more authentic connections. Users create profiles with blurred photos and focus on interests and personality. The design is modern, with smooth animations and an intuitive interface.

title: LocalTaste
description: A platform to buy local products directly from producers, without intermediaries. Users can create personalized baskets, explore fresh products, and support local businesses.

title: RollForge
description: This idea was born from my love for role-playing games and the need for a platform to manage games efficiently. I wanted to create a space where players and game masters could manage games, characters, and campaigns intuitively and personally.

title: Receptionist Web Profile
description: This work was a personal project to create a web profile highlighting the skills and experience of a receptionist. The design focused on clarity and professionalism, with sections and a contact form.

title: Krakskogens Förskola
description: This website was created for a daycare in Sweden, with the goal of providing clear and attractive information for parents. The design is simple and friendly, with sections to show daily activities, the work team, and a contact form.

title: My First Portfolio
description: Learning project where I experimented with different technologies and styles. It was a space to showcase my initial projects and learn how to structure a personal website using videos, music tracks, animations, transitions, and other interactive elements.

title: MinX
description: This is a simplified version of X (formerly Twitter) that I developed to practice my skills in React and Tailwind. The application allows users to create posts, follow other users, and see a news feed. The design is modern and minimalist with smooth animations.

title: My Portfolio 2026
description: Finally, this project is an evolution of my previous portfolios, where I have applied everything I've learned to create a personal website that reflects my growth as a developer. The design is modern and professional with distinct sections.
